class.name: FtgPackage
class.summary: Loader for FTG archives (Dark Reign game format)
class.details: Reads FTG archives as used by the Dark Reign game. The FTG format stores files in a flat directory with 28-byte filenames, uncompressed data at fixed offsets. When a .ftg bundle is loaded via FS_LoadBundle, every .spr sprite file found in the archive is automatically parsed and added to the project as a SpriteAnimation child object. Each .spr is converted into a horizontal-strip texture atlas (one GL_RED channel, ignoring the palette) where frames of varying sizes are placed side-by-side. The resulting SpriteAnimation objects can be looked up by name (the .spr filename without extension) and assigned to SKSpriteNode.Animation for rendering.
